description: Observation, description, and prediction of deformation of geomechanical systems at depth, and the forces (stress) causing those deformations, relevant for petroleum/geothermal reservoirs and studies of earthquake mechanics. Emphasis on computational exercises using datasets from the petroleum industry and earthquake catalogues, as well as prediction of ground deformation.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: GEOSCI/​CIV ENGR/​G L E/​M S & E  474, graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students
